overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot of a character sitting on a rocky outcrop overlooking a vast prairie landscape with distant mountains. The scene is peaceful with birds occasionally flying by and the character making small movements while observing the view.

events.description: flock of birds flies across the sky from right to left

agents.ego_description: sitting on a rocky outcrop overlooking the vast prairie landscape, occasionally shifting posture and raising an arm

notable_agents.action: flock of birds flying across the sky from right to left

entered.detail: large gray rock formation where the character is seated, occupying the right foreground
hazy blue mountain range visible on the horizon beneath the clouds
rolling green hills stretching into the distance with patches of grass
green leafy trees dotting the prairie landscape in the mid-ground
white fluffy clouds scattered across the blue sky above the mountains

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic shot shows a game character sitting on a rocky outcrop overlooking a vast sunlit prairie. The landscape features rolling green hills, scattered trees, and distant mountains under a blue sky with fluffy clouds. A flock of birds flies across the sky midway through the clip while the character occasionally shifts position.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic perspective of a character resting on a rocky outcrop overlooking a vast, sunlit prairie. It begins with a wide view of rolling green hills and scattered trees that stretch toward distant mountains under a bright blue sky. As the character occasionally shifts their position, the stillness of the landscape is punctuated by a flock of birds gliding across the horizon. The scene remains focused on this peaceful vista, with the fluffy clouds and distant peaks framing the character's quiet observation of the wilderness.
